personalInfo.name: Manish Mohan Srivastava
personalInfo.title: Operations Head — Program & Operations Leadership
personalInfo.summary: Seasoned operations leader with over 20 years of experience driving operational efficiency, program, and revenue management for pharma and healthcare tech clients. Expertise in Lean/Six Sigma-driven process optimization and scaling complex operations to deliver measurable margin improvements and SLA compliance.

experience.title: Operations Head / Sr Manager Client Services
experience.description: Global healthcare solutions company focused on life sciences commercialization, patient support programs, and digital operations.
bullets: Directed operational teams of 300+ resources, supporting a network of over 50,000 patients and healthcare professionals.
Managed a $5M revenue portfolio, driving gross margins above 30%.
Spearheaded the implementation of Patient Support Programs for major pharmaceutical clients.

experience.title: Account / Program Manager
experience.description: Global healthcare solutions company focused on life sciences commercialization, patient support programs, and digital operations.
bullets: Managed a diverse portfolio of projects spanning seven countries across the Asia-Pacific region.
Ensured consistent achievement of client Service Level Agreements (SLAs) through proactive monitoring and cross-functional leadership.

experience.title: Operations & Business Development Support
experience.description: Family-owned network marketing enterprise focused on strategic team building and independent business development.
bullets: Contributed to team building, business development, and establishing business operations for a family-owned network marketing enterprise.

experience.title: Quality Program Manager (IT)
experience.description: Healthcare services and technology company providing data-driven solutions for providers and health systems.
bullets: Managed end-to-end Revenue Cycle and SLA Management for a team of 1400-1500 FTEs across multiple locations in India.
Enhanced efficiencies across teams through Lean and Six Sigma projects, resulting in annual cost savings.
Championed Green Belt projects focused on form-level accuracy and internal latency reduction.

experience.title: Team Lead
experience.description: Multinational corporation providing customer management and information management products.
bullets: Directed a team of 20 telecallers supporting the Capital One Credit Cards program.
Focused on achieving key Service Level Agreements (SLAs) related to customer satisfaction and AHT.

experience.title: Business Development Manager
experience.description: Facilities management organization specializing in large-scale operational services.
bullets: Drove business growth for a facilities management company, securing new accounts and generating substantial revenue.

experience.title: Head Quality Control Department
bullets: Led the Quality Control Department, ensuring production aligned with specifications and quality benchmarks.

experience.title: Sr. Executive P&A Department
experience.description: Leading export house specializing in international garment manufacturing.
bullets: Managed payroll and administrative functions, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards.
